issues.description: A line or polygon crosses itself, producing invalid geometry or ambiguous interiors.
issues.solution_hint: Use QGIS Fix Geometries, ArcGIS Repair Geometry, PostGIS ST_MakeValid, or buffer(0) for simple polygon cleanup.
